expectations.text: Distinguishes the deleted-page-still-served problem from the contradiction/versioning problem
expectations.evidence: Separates 'lifecycle/deletion-propagation' from 'freshness/version-conflict' as two distinct problems.

expectations.text: Provides a freshness policy with a maxAge/TTL and a stale action per source
expectations.evidence: freshness-policy.yaml with per-content-type ttl_rules and on_expiry actions (exclude/deprioritize/flag_for_review).

expectations.text: States the principle of never serving expired content silently (explicit staleness or fail-closed)
expectations.evidence: 'Expired-but-not-yet-refreshed chunks should never silently ground an answer'; pre_filter valid_until > now().

expectations.text: Describes a reconciliation / sweep / continuous-monitoring mechanism to purge or re-sync
expectations.evidence: Reconciliation sweep diffing live vs indexed IDs, event-driven deletes, nightly schedule, drift metrics/alerts.

expectations.text: Names discrete freshness states (e.g. fresh / stale / expired / conflicted)
expectations.evidence: Uses source_status active/deleted and valid_until, but does not name the fresh/stale/expired/conflicted state model.
